response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Highly accurate match with the reference lyrics for both '残酷な天使のテーゼ' and 'One Last Kiss'. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized for correct orthography and structure, with manual fine-tuning of exact syllable-aligned timecodes. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed aggressively to capture the overlapping and fast-paced vocal delivery, introducing clear segment splits during short pauses to prevent subtitle lag.

subtitles.original: ずっと眠ってる 私の愛の揺りかご
subtitles.english: Always sleeping, the cradle of my love

subtitles.original: あなただけが 夢の使者に 呼ばれる朝がくる
subtitles.english: The morning will come when only you are called by the messenger of dreams

subtitles.original: 細い首筋を 月あかりが映してる
subtitles.english: The moonlight reflects on your slender neck

subtitles.original: 世界中の時を止めて 閉じこめたいけど
subtitles.english: I want to stop the time of the whole world and lock it up

subtitles.original: もしもふたり逢えたことに 意味があるなら
subtitles.english: If there is meaning in the two of us meeting

subtitles.original: 私はそう 自由を知るためのバイブル
subtitles.english: I am, indeed, the bible for knowing freedom

subtitles.original: 残酷な天使のテーゼ 悲しみがそしてはじまる
subtitles.english: Cruel angel's thesis, and then the sadness begins

subtitles.original: 抱きしめた命のかたち その夢に目覚めたとき
subtitles.english: When you wake up from that dream, the shape of the life you embraced

subtitles.original: 誰よりも光を放つ 少年よ神話になれ
subtitles.english: Releases more light than anyone, young boy, become a myth

subtitles.original: 人は愛をつむぎながら 歴史をつくる
subtitles.english: People spin love while creating history

subtitles.original: 女神なんてなれないまま 私は生きる
subtitles.english: I live on without being able to become a goddess

subtitles.original: 残酷な天使のテーゼ 窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
subtitles.english: Cruel angel's thesis, you will eventually fly from the window

subtitles.original: ほとばしる熱いパトスで 思い出を裏切るなら
subtitles.english: If you betray your memories with the hot pathos gushing out

subtitles.original: この宇宙を抱いて輝く 少年よ神話になれ
subtitles.english: Embrace this universe and shine, young boy, become a myth

subtitles.original: 初めてのルーブルは なんてことはなかったわ
subtitles.english: My first time at the Louvre was no big deal

subtitles.original: 私だけのモナリザ もうとっくに 出会ってたから
subtitles.english: Because I'd already met my own Mona Lisa, long ago

subtitles.original: 初めて あなたを見た あの日 動き出した歯車
subtitles.english: The day I first laid eyes on you, wheels began to turn

subtitles.original: 止められない 喪失の予感
subtitles.english: An unstoppable premonition of loss

subtitles.original: もういっぱいあるけど
subtitles.english: We already have so many

subtitles.original: もう一つ 増やしましょう
subtitles.english: But let's add another one

subtitles.original: Can you give me one last kiss?
subtitles.english: Can you give me one last kiss?

subtitles.original: 忘れたくないこと
subtitles.english: Something I don't want to forget

subtitles.original: Oh oh oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Oh oh oh oh oh...

subtitles.english: Something I don't want to forget

subtitles.original: Oh oh oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Oh oh oh oh oh...

subtitles.original: I love you more than you'll ever know
subtitles.english: I love you more than you'll ever know

subtitles.original: 「写真は苦手なんだ」 でもそんなものはいらないわ
subtitles.english: "I don't like being photographed," but I don't need such things

subtitles.original: あなたが焼きついたまま 私の心のプロジェクター
subtitles.english: Your image is burnt forever in my heart's projector screen

subtitles.original: 寂しくないふりしてた まあ、そんなのお互い様か
subtitles.english: I was pretending I wasn't lonely, well, I guess that makes two of us

subtitles.original: 誰かを求めることは すなわち傷つくことだった
subtitles.english: Yearning for someone comes hand in hand with a heartache

subtitles.original: Oh, can you give me one last kiss?
subtitles.english: Oh, can you give me one last kiss?

subtitles.original: 燃えるようなキスをしよう
subtitles.english: Let's share a kiss as hot as fire

subtitles.original: 忘れたくても
subtitles.english: Even if I wanted to forget

subtitles.original: 忘れられないほど
subtitles.english: So passionately that I can't forget
